explanation: This command simulates RDP tunneling via plink.exe using a non-standard port (443) and includes the local port forwarding rule. It matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria by including the port 3389 and plink.exe execution.

This command uses SSH port (22) and includes the same local port forwarding rule for RDP (3389). It aligns with the Sigma rule's detection logic by including the relevant port and plink.exe execution.
This command is a duplicate of the first example, but included to emphasize the test scenario for RDP tunneling via plink.exe using port 443.
